events.title: US Building Permits
events.why_it_matters: Indicator of housing market health and future economic growth.

events.title: US Housing Starts
events.impact: Measures the number of new residential construction projects.
events.why_it_matters: Leading indicator of economic activity and housing demand.

events.title: US Import/Export Prices
events.impact: Tracks inflation in goods crossing borders.
events.why_it_matters: Influences overall CPI and monetary policy expectations.

events.title: CA Foreign Stock Investment
events.impact: Tracks Canadian investment in foreign equities.
events.why_it_matters: Indicator of capital flows and investor sentiment.
